- [x] T-027 | Security Audit and Hardening | @developer-2 | deps: none | done:2026-03-05T04:30:00.000Z
  > [pipeline] Handed off to review stage
  > 
  > Comprehensive security audit completed
  > 
  > Generated SECURITY_AUDIT_REPORT.md with 20 findings:
  > - 3 Critical severity (rate limiting, CSP, OAuth state)
  > - 5 High severity (password policy, token invalidation, audit logging, file upload, error messages)
  > - 8 Medium severity (HTTPS, CORS, JWT expiration, MFA, debug page, localStorage)
  > - 4 Low severity (best practices)
  > 
  > Key positive findings:
  > - ✅ All SQL queries use parameterized statements (SQL injection protected)
  > - ✅ Strong password hashing with bcryptjs
  > - ✅ Proper JWT implementation with jose library
  > - ✅ Consistent role-based access control
  > - ✅ Zod input validation on all endpoints
  > 
  > Critical recommendations requiring immediate action:
  > 1. Implement rate limiting on all API endpoints
  > 2. Add Content Security Policy headers
  > 3. Fix OAuth state parameter validation (CSRF protection)
  > 4. Strengthen password policy to 12+ chars with complexity
  > 5. Implement token versioning for password changes
  > 6. Add comprehensive audit logging for admin actions

- [x] T-009 | Performance Optimization Audit | @project-manager | deps: T-003 | done:2026-03-05T13:15:00.000Z
  > [pipeline] Handed off to develop stage
  > [pipeline] Handed off to qa stage
  > [pipeline] Handed off to review stage
  > 
  > Comprehensive performance optimization audit completed
  > 
  > Generated PERFORMANCE_AUDIT_REPORT.md with 12 sections covering:
  > - Executive summary with performance score: 8/10
  > - Frontend bundle analysis (1.2MB JS bundle identified)
  > - Backend API performance analysis
  > - Database query performance (well-optimized: 9/10)
  > - Runtime performance analysis (console logging overhead)
  > - Asset optimization recommendations
  > - Cloudflare Workers CPU time analysis
  > - Core Web Vitals gap analysis
  > - Prioritized 4-phase optimization roadmap (6 weeks)
  > - Technical debt summary (7 items documented)
  > - Implementation checklist and testing guide
  > 
  > Critical findings:
  > 🔴 1.2MB JavaScript bundle (needs code splitting) - 67% reduction target
  > 🔴 No API response caching - 80% improvement opportunity
  > 🟠 Console logging in production - blocking operations
  > 🟡 No pagination on list endpoints - scalability risk
  > 🟡 TanStack Query underutilized - 50% more API calls than needed
  > 
  > Priority actions (Week 1):
  > 1. Implement route-based code splitting with React.lazy()
  > 2. Add React.Suspense loading fallbacks
  > 3. Test bundle size reduction (target: 1.2MB → 400KB)
  > 
  > Expected impact after Phase 1-2:
  > - Page load time: 3.2s → 1.1s (65% faster)
  > - API response time: 200ms → 80ms (60% faster)
  > - Bundle size: 1.2MB → 400KB (67% reduction)
  > 
  > Deliverables: PERFORMANCE_AUDIT_REPORT.md (28KB, 12 sections, 650+ lines)
